subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the Book in truth and made it the Supreme Balance between the nations and the Most Great Sign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الکتاب بالحق و جعله القسطاس الاعظم بین الامم و الایه الکبری
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @apocalyptic imagery, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
